title: Apple Vision Pro Shoot Ended in Fatal Aircraft Crash - MacRumors
description: Apple Vision Pro Shoot Ended in Fatal Aircraft Crash  MacRumorsPilot in Deadly Plane Crash Was Being Filmed for Apple Vision Pro Video  Bloomberg.comSafety concerns were reported to Apple before pilot killed during Vision Pro filming  9to5MacIncident during Vision Pro film production: Fatal crash in Jordan  heise onlineApple Immersive Video documentary pilot died in microlight aircraft crash  AppleInsider
